stemHtml: An aircraft wing has a CL of 0.38. The pilot deploys a stage of flaps, then decreases speed to maintain the same altitude. Which of the following is correct?

options.a: The new C<sub>L </sub>is greater than 0.38 because flaps always increase the C<sub>L</sub>.
options.b: The new C<sub>L</sub> must be greater than 0.38 to maintain the same altitude.
options.d: The new C<sub>L </sub>is 0.38 because you're still at the same altitude.
